title: Protecting Life on College Campus Act of 2025
short_title: Protecting Life on College Campus Act of 2025
plain_summary: This bill would stop colleges from getting federal money if their health clinics give abortion pills or do abortions for students or workers. Colleges that have health clinics on campus would have to promise every year that they do not provide these abortion services. If they want to keep getting money from the government, they must follow this rule. The bill is meant to prevent abortion services from being available at college health centers.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Protecting Life on College Campus Act of two thousand twenty five.

sections.title: Section 2 Prohibition on Award of Funds to Certain Institutions of Higher Education
sections.text: No college or university can receive any money from the federal government if it has or works with a health clinic on campus that gives abortion drugs or performs abortions for students or employees. This includes money given directly to the college or money given through contracts with other organizations. Every year, colleges that have health clinics on campus must send a report to the Secretary of Education and the Secretary of Health and Human Services. This report must promise that their health clinics do not provide abortion drugs or abortions to students or employees. A college that follows this law cannot be punished by state governments just for following this federal law. For this law, abortion drug means any medicine or combination of medicines that is meant to kill an unborn baby when a woman is pregnant or to end a pregnancy for reasons other than having a live birth, removing a baby that has already died, or treating a pregnancy that happens outside the womb called an ectopic pregnancy. Institution of higher education means what that term means in section one hundred two of the Higher Education Act of nineteen sixty five. School based service site means a health clinic that provides medical care to students and is located on a college campus that gets federal money. This includes basic health care, family planning services, remote health care using technology, and pharmacy services whether the services are provided by clinic employees or outside contractors. This does not include hospitals as defined in section eighteen sixty one of the Social Security Act.
